Notes: NRND — successor is ESP32-C3-MINI-1-N4X (chip rev v1.1, same pinout). Alt: ESP32-C3-MINI-1-H4 (C2934569). Any ESP32-C3 module with 4MB flash.
Alt: ADNS-2080. YS8205 is NOT a standalone sensor (integrated USB mouse controller — not viable). Any SPI optical mouse sensor ≥800 CPI. Check LCSC for availability.
Paired with sensor — some sensors include LED in package. Check sensor datasheet.
Usually sold as sensor + lens kit. Must match sensor package.
Alt: any 4–6mm metal dome, 150–250gf actuation. Murata, C&K also supply.
Size constraint: must fit in ring shell. Target ≤20x15x4mm. Must include integrated PCM and UN 38.3 documentation. No harvested cells.

Alt: LTC4054ES5-4.2 (Analog Devices, DigiKey 960438 — true pin-compatible). TP4056 requires SOP-8 footprint (NOT drop-in). MCP73831 SOT-23-5 has different pinout (verify PCB layout). No NTC input — see NTC/MOSFET lines below.
0.5µA quiescent — critical for deep sleep (AP2112K's 55µA dominates sleep budget 11:1). Alt: XC6220B331MR (8µA Iq). NOT AP2112K.
Charging + serial flash. 2-pin (power only) acceptable for production; 16-pin for dev/debug.
Standard ceramic MLCC. One per IC.
Input cap for LDO.
IBAT = 1000V/RPROG. 20kΩ → 50mA (0.625C on 80mAh). 10kΩ (100mA) produces unsafe temps in sealed ring — see BATTERY-SAFETY.md §5.
Bonded to cell or adjacent on PCB. Required — TP4054 has no temp monitoring. See BATTERY-SAFETY.md §7.1.
ADC scaling for NTC thermistor.
On VBUS before TP4054 VCC. GPIO-controlled. Gate floats high (off) = charge disabled (safe default). See BATTERY-SAFETY.md §7.1.
Default-off gate bias for Q1.
Prototype pricing for flex. Rigid PCB ~$0.50–1.00 for dev board lashup.
Nylon (SLS/MJF) or PLA/PETG (FDM). Parametric for finger_circumference.
